items.title: WR Chris Brazzell to visit Packers, Commanders, 49ers this week
items.body_text: Wide receiver Chris Brazzell is wrapping up the pre-draft visit window with a busy week.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Zach Ertz: I don't want torn ACL to be my last play
items.body_text: A report in February indicated that tight end Zach Ertz wants to play in 2026 and Ertz has confirmed that his plan is to return for a 14th NFL season.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Drake Maye: Everyone says you'll get back to Super Bowl, it's not that easy
items.body_text: Patriots quarterback Drake Maye's second season ended with a rough game against the Seahawks in the Super Bowl, but getting that far that early in his career would seem to be a good sign for future trips to big games.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Texas Tech quarterback Behren Morton says he's had pre-draft meetings with most NFL teams
items.body_text: Texas Tech quarterback Behren Morton is not viewed as an elite draft prospect, but plenty of teams are keeping tabs on him as a potential late-round pick with long-term upside.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: After Fernando Mendoza and Ty Simpson, third QB drafted may have a long wait
items.body_text: LSU's Garrett Nussmeier, Penn State's Drew Allar and Miami's Carson Beck are among the potential Day 2 quarterbacks.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: George Gumbs generating draft buzz as a wide receiver-turned edge rusher
items.body_text: College football players change positions often, but few start off as wide receivers and end up as edge rushers, and even fewer show the promise that Florida edge rusher George Gumbs has shown.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Todd Monken: How do Browns change the narrative? Win. Winning changes everything.
items.body_text: The Browns' new coach says changing the way people look at the franchise is simple.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Report: Rueben Bain was involved in fatal collision in 2024
items.body_text: Former Miami defensive end Rueben Bain was reportedly involved in a fatal vehicular collision in March 2024.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Joe Buck wants to stay at ESPN for the rest of his career
items.body_text: At a time when ESPN's Troy Aikman has made plenty of waves in the NFL pool for his South Beach side gig, Aikman's partner has generated a bit of slow-time news.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: NFL should embrace UFL's officiating transparency
items.body_text: Perception is reality, and the reality is that too many people are suspicious of officiating decisions.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Report: Mike Vrabel won't be participating in Patriots' pre-draft press conference
items.body_text: Last year, Patriots coach Mike Vrabel conducted a pre-draft conference.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Paxton Lynch suffers torn ACL while playing arena football
items.body_text: Seven years after the ship sailed on Paxton Lynch's NFL career, he's still dog paddling after it.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Columbus Aviators coach Ted Ginn Jr. is arrested for DUI in Dallas, one day before a game
items.body_text: On the day before his team's next game, Columbus Aviators coach Ted Ginn Jr. was arrested for DUI.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: The Athletic confirms that Dianna Russini is under investigation, "will not be reporting"
items.body_text: Everybody wants to cover sports media.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Collusion appeal ruling says Ravens offered Lamar Jackson two fully-guaranteed contracts
items.body_text: New document doesn't specify the compensation offered, or whether the deals had no-tag clauses.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Jaylen Warren on Aaron Rodgers: Great if he's back, we'll miss him if not
items.body_text: One of the remaining unanswered questions for the NFL offseason is whether Aaron Rodgers will be back at quarterback for the Steelers this fall.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: D.C. Defenders, up 28-0 over Houston, have biggest halftime lead in UFL history
items.body_text: The home opener for the defending UFL champions is going well.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: YouTube, Netflix, Fox are in play for special five-game 2026 package
items.body_text: As the NFL embarks on an effort to renegotiate its various full-season TV packages, the league continues to shop a five-game package of games to be televised during the 2026 season.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Texas Tech WR Caleb Douglas has four top-30 visits
items.body_text: Texas Tech wide receiver Caleb Douglas is projected as a third-day pick in the draft later this month.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: JC Tretter promptly informed player reps about collusion appeal ruling
items.body_text: The original ruling was hidden; the new decision was not.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Is there a double standard for Mike Vrabel, Dianna Russini?
items.body_text: The NFL's biggest story of the week has sparked plenty of debates and discussions, for those in the media who have bothered to mention it.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Roger Goodell shrugs at Kyle Shanahan's Australia gripe
items.body_text: NFL has no qualms about imposing major time, travel demands on 49ers, Rams.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Cowboys' Markquese Bell arrested for possession of controlled substance
items.body_text: Cowboys safety Markquese Bell was arrested on drug charges Friday in the Dallas suburb of Prosper, Texas.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: An odd UFL rule results in a Louisville penalty awarding the game to Orlando
items.body_text: In the UFL, if the defense commits two penalties in overtime, the second penalty results in a score for the offense.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Kyle Juszczyk: It's OK to be skeptical and ask questions about electrical substation
items.body_text: There's no hard evidence to support the idea that 49ers players are more susceptible to injuries because they practice near an electrical substation.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Report: Dianna Russini "will not be reporting" during internal investigation
items.body_text: The New York Times has reversed course regarding NFL insider Dianna Russini.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: NFL wins appeal of collusion grievance (with an asterisk)
items.body_text: Appeals panel confirms that NFL invited teams to collude.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Jack Jones agrees to terms with 49ers
items.body_text: Free agent cornerback Jack Jones' visit to the 49ers apparently went well.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Free agent CB Jack Jones visits the 49ers
items.body_text: The 49ers spent some time with a possible veteran addition to their secondary on Friday.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Ole Miss WR De'Zhaun Stribling has four top-30 visits scheduled
items.body_text: Ole Miss wide receiver De'Zhaun Stribling has had a busy itinerary.
items.author: Charean Williams
